steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: GRB 230307A lasted 200 seconds, but neutron-merger bursts typically last fewer than 2 seconds. The blank must describe what this 200-second burst represents within its category — something atypical or strange.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — an oddity: means something strange or abnormal — exactly what a burst 100x longer than normal is. ✓
  • Choice B — a coincidence: implies two things happening by chance at the same time — not a descriptor of abnormality. ✗
  • Choice C — a reprieve: means a temporary relief from something bad — wrong domain entirely. ✗
  • Choice D — an incident: just means an event — too neutral, doesn't capture the unusualness. ✗
That matches Choice A — an oddity.
